title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Wadhwa Group

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Wadhwa Group
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Wadhwa Group in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Wadhwa Group:
Wadhwa Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wadhwa Group!
